# ASAP Pest and Wildlife Removal
## About
Humane wildlife removal and pest control serving Metro Atlanta. Licensed by Georgia DNR, Department of Agriculture, and State of Georgia. Available 24 hours a day, 6 days a week.
## Services
- Wildlife Removal: https://wildliferemovalasap.com/services/wildlife-removal.html — Raccoons, squirrels, bats, snakes, opossums, birds. Humane trapping and relocation.
- Pest Control: https://wildliferemovalasap.com/services/pest-control.html — Rats, mice, roaches, ants. Eco-friendly methods.
- Exclusion & Sealing: https://wildliferemovalasap.com/services/exclusion.html — Seal entry points. Warranty-backed.
- Disinfection & Cleanup: https://wildliferemovalasap.com/services/disinfection.html — Attic, crawl space cleanup. Health hazard removal.
- Dead Animal Removal: https://wildliferemovalasap.com/services/dead-animal-removal.html — Locate, remove, sanitize.
- Commercial Services: https://wildliferemovalasap.com/services/commercial.html — Business pest and wildlife management.
## Process
Four-step: Inspect → Trap → Exclude → Disinfect
## Service Area
Metro Atlanta and surrounding areas. Atlanta, GA 30331.
## Contact
Phone: (770) 691-3636
Email: info@wildliferemovalasap.com
Booking: https://cal-asap.buildwisemedia.com/asap-pest-wildlife/consultation
## Hours
24 hours Monday-Saturday. Closed Sunday.
## Pricing
- Wildlife removal: $200-$2,000 (scope-based)
- Pest control: $150-$800
- Exclusion work: $500-$3,000
- Disinfection/cleanup: $400-$3,000
- Dead animal removal: $150-$500
- Commercial: Custom plans from $300/month
All pricing based on on-site inspection. Multiple price options offered.
